mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice ( title, content, publisher_id, publisher_name, publish_time, status ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{publisherName}, #{publishTime}, #{status} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM notice WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE notice
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
publisher_id = #{publisherId},
publisher_name = #{publisherName},
publish_time = #{publishTime},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, publisher_id AS publisherId, publisher_name AS publisherName, publish_time AS publishTime, status, is_deleted AS isDeleted, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM notice WHERE id = #{id}
